ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: 'Auto' tries the kuml-web server first, then falls back to the CLI. Use 'Server only' if you always run kuml serve. Use 'CLI only' for fully offline rendering (desktop only).
ast.target: '自动'会先尝试kuml-web服务器，然后回退到CLI。如果你总是运行kuml serve，请使用'仅服务器'。对于完全离线渲染（仅限桌面端），请使用'仅CLI'。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Base URL of the running kuml-web server. Start it with: kuml serve
ast.target: 正在运行的kuml-web服务器的基础URL。使用以下命令启动：kuml serve

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to the kuml binary. Use 'kuml' if it is on your PATH, or an absolute path like /usr/local/bin/kuml. Desktop only.
ast.target: kuml二进制文件的路径。如果它在你的PATH中，请使用'kuml'，或者使用绝对路径，如/usr/local/bin/kuml。仅限桌面端。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Renders kuml code blocks as inline SVG diagrams. Diagrams are evaluated by the kuml-web server or the kuml CLI binary.
ast.target: 将kuml代码块渲染为内联SVG图表。图表由kuml-web服务器或kuml CLI二进制文件进行评估。
